notes: Docker preflight build-only pass required a timeout retry with DOCKER_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=900 after the first 420s attempt reached the final chown step.
Cloud Run /monitoring without auth returned 403 as expected.
AI Q1 used monitoring-server-health severity taxonomy and matched the resource-alert surface; dashboard host-status tile was not used as a strict parity oracle.
Standard Q5 confirmed conversational context for the previous action-needed server set and filtered network >= 70% to lb-haproxy-dc1-01.
